assessment_objectives.objective: the organization defines use cases for Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT).
the organization defines geographic markets for Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT).
the organization defines the use of Intellectual Property (IP) for Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT).
the organization ensures deployed Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) conform to applicable statutory and regulatory requirements, based on defined use cases.
the organization ensures deployed Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) conform to applicable statutory and regulatory requirements, based on geographic markets.

the organization ensures deployed Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) conform to applicable statutory and regulatory requirements, based on the use of Intellectual Property (IP).
